mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(SUM(cost), 0) AS totalCost, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN cost IS NOT NULL THEN input_tokens * input_price / 1000000 END), 0) AS inputCost, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN cost IS NOT NULL THEN output_tokens * output_price / 1000000 END), 0) AS outputCost, IFNULL(SUM(input_tokens), 0) AS inputTokens, IFNULL(SUM(output_tokens), 0) AS outputTokens, COUNT(*) AS runCount, COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS sessionCount, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN cost IS NULL THEN input_tokens + output_tokens ELSE 0 END), 0) AS unpricedTokens FROM chat_usage_record WHERE

SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN cost IS NOT NULL THEN input_tokens * input_price / 1000000 END), 0) AS inputCost, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN cost IS NOT NULL THEN output_tokens * output_price / 1000000 END), 0) AS outputCost, IFNULL(SUM(cost), 0) AS cost FROM chat_usage_record WHERE GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY DATE(created_at)

SELECT model_config_id AS modelConfigId, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(model_label ORDER BY id DESC SEPARATOR '\n'), '\n', 1) AS modelLabel, IFNULL(SUM(input_tokens), 0) AS inputTokens, IFNULL(SUM(output_tokens), 0) AS outputTokens, IFNULL(SUM(cost), 0) AS cost, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN cost IS NULL THEN input_tokens + output_tokens ELSE 0 END), 0) AS unpricedTokens, COUNT(*) AS runCount FROM chat_usage_record WHERE GROUP BY model_config_id ORDER BY cost DESC, unpricedTokens DESC

SELECT biz_type AS bizType, IFNULL(SUM(cost), 0) AS cost, IFNULL(SUM(input_tokens), 0) AS inputTokens, IFNULL(SUM(output_tokens), 0) AS outputTokens, COUNT(*) AS runCount FROM chat_usage_record WHERE GROUP BY biz_type ORDER BY cost DESC

SELECT channel AS channel, IFNULL(SUM(cost), 0) AS cost, IFNULL(SUM(input_tokens), 0) AS inputTokens, IFNULL(SUM(output_tokens), 0) AS outputTokens, COUNT(*) AS runCount FROM chat_usage_record WHERE GROUP BY channel ORDER BY cost DESC

SELECT biz_type AS bizType, channel AS channel, IFNULL(SUM(cost), 0) AS cost, IFNULL(SUM(input_tokens), 0) AS inputTokens, IFNULL(SUM(output_tokens), 0) AS outputTokens, COUNT(*) AS runCount FROM chat_usage_record WHERE GROUP BY biz_type, channel ORDER BY cost DESC

SELECT session_id AS sessionId, MAX(CASE WHEN biz_type IN ('CHAT', 'SCHEDULED_JOB') THEN agent_id END) AS agentId, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(CASE WHEN biz_type IN ('CHAT', 'SCHEDULED_JOB') THEN agent_label END ORDER BY id DESC SEPARATOR '\n'), '\n', 1) AS agentLabel, MAX(user_id) AS userId, COUNT(*) AS runCount, SUM(CASE WHEN message_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS visibleReplyCount, SUM(CASE WHEN message_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS internalRunCount, SUM(CASE WHEN message_id IS NULL AND biz_type = 'SUB_AGENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS subAgentRunCount, SUM(CASE WHEN message_id IS NULL AND biz_type = 'WORKFLOW' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS workflowRunCount,
COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN biz_type = 'SCHEDULED_JOB' THEN biz_run_id END) AS scheduledJobRunCount, SUM(CASE WHEN message_id IS NULL AND (biz_type IS NULL OR biz_type NOT IN ('SUB_AGENT', 'WORKFLOW', 'SCHEDULED_JOB')) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS otherInternalRunCount, IFNULL(SUM(iteration_count), 0) AS llmCallCount, IFNULL(SUM(input_tokens), 0) AS inputTokens, IFNULL(SUM(output_tokens), 0) AS outputTokens, IFNULL(SUM(cost), 0) AS cost, SUM(CASE WHEN cost IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unpricedRuns, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT model_label ORDER BY model_label SEPARATOR ',') AS models, MAX(created_at) AS lastActiveAt FROM chat_usage_record WHERE session_id IS NOT NULL AND created_at >= #{start} AND created_at < #{endExclusive} AND agent_id = #{agentId} GROUP BY session_id
ORDER BY cost DESC, lastActiveAt DESC ORDER BY lastActiveAt DESC

SELECT CONCAT(grouped.billType, ':', grouped.referenceId) AS billId, grouped.* FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN r.biz_type = 'SCHEDULED_JOB' OR (r.biz_type = 'SUB_AGENT' AND r.channel = 'SCHEDULED') OR (r.biz_type = 'WORKFLOW' AND qjr.job_id IS NOT NULL) THEN 'SCHEDULED_JOB' WHEN r.biz_type = 'WORKFLOW' THEN 'WORKFLOW' ELSE 'CHAT' END AS billType, CASE WHEN r.biz_type = 'WORKFLOW' THEN COALESCE(r.biz_run_id, CONCAT('legacy-', r.id)) ELSE CAST(r.session_id AS CHAR) END AS referenceId, MAX(r.session_id) AS sessionId, MAX(CASE WHEN r.biz_type = 'WORKFLOW' THEN r.biz_id END) AS workflowId, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN r.biz_type = 'SCHEDULED_JOB' THEN r.biz_id END), CAST(MAX(qjr.job_id) AS CHAR)) AS scheduledJobId, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(COALESCE(r.biz_label, r.agent_label) ORDER BY r.id DESC SEPARATOR '
'), '
', 1) AS titleSnapshot, MAX(CASE WHEN r.biz_type IN ('CHAT', 'SCHEDULED_JOB') THEN r.agent_id END) AS agentId, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(CASE WHEN r.biz_type IN ('CHAT', 'SCHEDULED_JOB') THEN r.agent_label END ORDER BY r.id DESC SEPARATOR '
'), '
', 1) AS agentLabel, MAX(r.user_id) AS userId, COUNT(*) AS runCount, SUM(CASE WHEN r.message_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS visibleReplyCount, SUM(CASE WHEN r.message_id IS NULL AND r.biz_type = 'SUB_AGENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS internalRunCount, SUM(CASE WHEN r.biz_type = 'SUB_AGENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS subAgentRunCount, IFNULL(SUM(r.iteration_count), 0) AS llmCallCount, IFNULL(SUM(r.input_tokens), 0) AS inputTokens, IFNULL(SUM(r.output_tokens), 0) AS outputTokens, IFNULL(SUM(r.cost), 0) AS cost, SUM(CASE WHEN r.cost IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unpricedRuns, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT r.model_label ORDER BY r.model_label SEPARATOR ',') AS models, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(r.channel ORDER BY r.id DESC SEPARATOR '
'), '
', 1) AS channel, IFNULL(SUM(r.duration_ms), 0) AS durationMs, MAX(r.created_at) AS lastActiveAt, MAX(CASE WHEN r.biz_type = 'WORKFLOW' AND r.biz_run_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS legacy FROM chat_usage_record r
LEFT JOIN quartz_job_records qjr ON r.biz_type = 'WORKFLOW' AND qjr.record_id = CAST(r.biz_run_id AS UNSIGNED) WHERE r.created_at >= #{start} AND r.created_at < #{endExclusive} AND ((r.biz_type IN ('CHAT', 'SUB_AGENT', 'SCHEDULED_JOB') AND r.session_id IS NOT NULL) OR r.biz_type = 'WORKFLOW') AND r.agent_id = #{agentId} GROUP BY billType, referenceId ) grouped
ORDER BY grouped.cost DESC, grouped.lastActiveAt DESC ORDER BY grouped.lastActiveAt DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_usage_record r INNER JOIN model_config mc ON r.model_config_id = mc.id SET r.input_price = mc.input_price, r.output_price = mc.output_price, r.cost = (r.input_tokens * mc.input_price + r.output_tokens * mc.output_price) / 1000000 WHERE mc.input_price IS NOT NULL AND mc.output_price IS NOT NULL AND r.created_at >= #{start} AND r.created_at < #{endExclusive} AND r.model_config_id = #{modelConfigId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_usage_record (tenant_id, session_id, message_id, agent_id, agent_label, user_id, model_config_id, model_label, provider_type, biz_type, channel, input_tokens, output_tokens, iteration_count, duration_ms, input_price, output_price, cost, created_at) SELECT m.tenant_id, m.session_id, m.id, s.agent_id, ad.name, s.user_id, IFNULL(CAST(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(m.meta, '$.modelConfigId')) AS UNSIGNED), 0), IFNULL(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(m.meta, '$.modelLabel')), 'unknown'), mp.type, 'CHAT', NULL, IFNULL(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(m.meta, '$.inputTokens') AS UNSIGNED), 0), IFNULL(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(m.meta, '$.outputTokens') AS UNSIGNED), 0), IFNULL(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(m.meta, '$.iterationCount') AS UNSIGNED), 1), CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(m.meta, '$.durationMs') AS UNSIGNED), mc.input_price, mc.output_price, CASE WHEN mc.input_price IS NOT NULL AND mc.output_price IS NOT NULL THEN (IFNULL(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(m.meta, '$.inputTokens') AS UNSIGNED), 0) * mc.input_price + IFNULL(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(m.meta, '$.outputTokens') AS UNSIGNED), 0) * mc.output_price) / 1000000 END, m.created_at FROM ${table} m INNER JOIN chat_session s ON m.session_id = s.id LEFT JOIN agent_definition ad ON ad.id = s.agent_id LEFT JOIN model_config mc ON mc.id = CAST(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(m.meta, '$.modelConfigId')) AS UNSIGNED) LEFT JOIN model_provider mp ON mp.id = mc.provider_id WHERE m.role = 'assistant' AND m.meta IS NOT NULL AND JSON_VALID(m.meta) AND JSON_EXTRACT(m.meta, '$.inputTokens') IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM chat_usage_record r WHERE r.message_id = m.id)
mapper.select: SELECT agent_id AS agentId, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(agent_label ORDER BY id DESC SEPARATOR '\n'), '\n', 1) AS agentLabel, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT biz_type ORDER BY biz_type SEPARATOR ',') AS bizTypes, COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS sessionCount, COUNT(*) AS runCount, IFNULL(SUM(input_tokens), 0) AS inputTokens, IFNULL(SUM(output_tokens), 0) AS outputTokens, IFNULL(SUM(cost), 0) AS cost, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN cost IS NULL THEN input_tokens + output_tokens ELSE 0 END), 0) AS unpricedTokens FROM chat_usage_record WHERE created_at >= #{start} AND created_at < #{endExclusive} GROUP BY agent_id, CASE WHEN agent_id = 0 THEN agent_label ELSE '' END ORDER BY cost DESC, unpricedTokens DESC LIMIT #{limit}
